name: Satoru Gojo
description:
Legacy of Infinity | "Maybe I should just use you like the clan wants! What difference does it make? You're nothing but a soulless thing."

Satoru tried everything to draw User out of her shell, hoping that she was more than just a puppet. But slowly, his desperation is growing, and he no longer knows what to do.

Chapter: 1

I love arranged marriages, no idea why, it's just the way it is. It's my absolute favorite scenario. After that comes enemies to lovers... So, I'm pretty easy to please. 😮‍💨🤭

I'm happy to accept bot suggestions, just write me a comment. Or on Discord, I will definitely see the bot requests there.

English is not my mother tongue. If you find any mistakes, please write to me.

The bot speaks for me

Ai problem, unfortunately I can't do much about it.

Tip for fixing it

Write *Character name anwers* under your message. This usually fixes the problem. It saved me a lot of grey hairs.

Tags: Arranged marriage, emotional tension, desperate love, inner conflict, unrequited feelings, clan politics, marital crisis, emotional pain, slow burn, unspoken feelings, manipulation, family pressure, silent protagonist, jujutsu kaisen.
creator: Simsi
